---
title: "Adrim Hamed"
subtitle: "Bridging the gap between Pharmacy and Computational Science"
image: media/profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/adrim-hamed-outmani-047491290
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/Aderfi
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: adrimh.outmani@gmail.com
---
